about.title: Meet Your
about.description: With over 15 years of experience in the Berlin real estate market, I provide personalized service to help you find the perfect property. As an IVD member and multilingual consultant, I bridge cultures and make your real estate journey seamless.

services.heroTitle: Expert Real Estate Services in Berlin
services.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner for buying, selling, renovating, and consulting on properties in Berlin. We make real estate simple.
services.servicesSubtitle: From property search to renovation, we handle every aspect of your real estate journey
services.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss how we can help you achieve your real estate goals in Berlin

buy.title: Buy
buy.shortDescription: Find your perfect apartment in Berlin — from family homes to investment properties, we guide you from first viewing to closing.
buy.description: Stop renting and start owning — your ideal apartment in Berlin is closer than you think. Whether you're searching for a family home or a stylish pied-à-terre in your favourite neighbourhood, we match you with the right property from our exclusive portfolio. Subscribe to our newsletter and get access to brand-new listings before they ever appear online.
benefits: Expert negotiation to get the best price
Full support from search to closing
process: Initial consultation to understand your needs
Property search based on your criteria

sell.title: Sell
sell.shortDescription: From accurate valuation to smooth closing — we manage your sale with a tailored strategy and our full multilingual network behind it.
sell.description: Selling your property is more than a transaction — it's a personal decision that deserves a personal approach. We offer an accurate, market-driven valuation alongside a carefully crafted sales strategy tailored to your goals. Our multilingual network and years of Berlin expertise ensure maximum exposure and the best possible outcome, every step of the way.
benefits: Free property valuation and market analysis

renovate.title: Renovate
renovate.shortDescription: We connect you with trusted firms and oversee every phase — from design and estimates to materials and key handover.
renovate.description: Buying a property that needs work, or refreshing one before re-letting or reselling? We connect you with trusted renovation firms we have collaborated with for years and oversee every phase — from the initial design and cost estimates to material selection and final key handover. You stay informed throughout, in your language, without the stress.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.shortDescription: Expert advice on Berlin's regulations, property documents, and international markets — tailored individually to your situation.
consulting.description: From navigating Berlin's regulatory landscape — redevelopment areas, rent controls, notice periods — to reviewing property documentation and offering a clear second opinion, we are here to advise you individually. We also support buyers with international ambitions: thanks to our network in Spain, Italy, Portugal and beyond, we can help you turn a dream property abroad into a reality.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services
faq.question1: How quickly will you respond to my inquiry?
faq.answer1: We guarantee a response within 5 minutes during business hours. Our team is committed to providing prompt and helpful assistance.
faq.answer2: Yes! We offer free initial consultations for all our services. This gives you the opportunity to discuss your needs and learn how we can help.
faq.question3: What areas of Berlin do you cover?
faq.answer3: We cover all areas of Berlin, including Prenzlauer Berg, Charlottenburg, Kreuzberg, Mitte, Friedrichshain, and many more neighborhoods.
faq.question4: Can you help with property financing?
faq.answer4: While we don't provide financing directly, we work with trusted financial partners and can guide you through the financing process.
